engine.ladder_reasoning: Though coaching is expertise, it is sold as a productized subscription membership: tiered pricing, 'what's included' feature accordions, courses/tools, and 'improve 8-10%' proof-it-works stats. The visitor evaluates the PROGRAM as a thing, not a specific person/firm to hire.

goal.one_action: sign up for the free insider membership / free course (email capture); secondary = subscribe to a paid training plan

structure.archetype_note: Content-marketing membership funnel: free-signup magnet up top, deep program/feature/pricing argument, blog + community. 25 pages visible in nav; 5 captured.

unmapped.observed: Award-Winning Blog (3 featured article previews on home)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section for a latest-posts / blog-teaser grid; it is neither testimonials nor generic content

proposed_new.name: email-capture-popup / external-list-signup
proposed_new.evidence: All primary 'Get Started Free' + newsletter CTAs route off-site to app.monstercampaigns.com rather than an on-site lead-form; a subscribe-follow magnet delegated to a third-party list-builder isn't expressible by the on-site lead-form capability

proposed_new.name: blog-teaser
proposed_new.evidence: Home 'Award-Winning Blog' shows 3 featured post previews linking into the blog; distinct from the blog capability (which is the post index itself)

design_style.none_fits_because: design_hints empty (no fonts, colors, or light/dark captured); cannot responsibly assign one of the 6 styles from structure alone.

confidence.why: Full 5-page capture with verbatim pricing, but the site is multi-goal (free-membership email capture vs paid-subscription purchase vs contact), making the single one_action a judgment call; and no design hints were captured, forcing design_style null.

gap_findings: Multi-goal membership funnel strains the 'one conversion action' ICP: free email-capture magnet + paid tiered subscription + contact form coexist as co-equal goals.
Primary subscribe-follow CTAs delegate to an external list-builder (monstercampaigns) popup, not an on-site form — no capability expresses 'off-site email-capture magnet'.
No canonical section id for a blog-teaser / featured-posts grid on a marketing page (mapped to miscellaneous as least-bad fit).
'Help Me...' interactive goal-selector toggle (race vs health) that branches the page argument has no canonical section; mapped to useCases.
